item.title: Export bundle directory and archive file created without secure modes — agent data world-readable on multi-user systems
item.intent: The export bundle output directory must be created with mode 0700 and the bundle archive must be written with mode 0600 — the export contains agent workspace, ops data, and identity files that must not be readable by other users on multi-user systems.
item.description: src/evolve/lifecycle/export.ts line 238 calls mkdirSync(parentDir, { recursive: true }) without a mode option when creating the parent directory for the export bundle. This creates the directory with default permissions (0755), world-readable. Line 242 calls createWriteStream(bundlePath) without a mode option, creating the bundle archive with default permissions (typically 0644), world-readable. The export bundle contains workspace data, ops/audit traces, tool and skill configs, and identity files — sensitive agent data that other users on the system can read. Credentials and .env are excluded, but audit logs and conversation memory are included. Fix: add mode DIR_MODE_SECRET to mkdirSync on line 238 and chmodSync after for existing directories. Pass mode FILE_MODE_SECRET to createWriteStream via { mode: FILE_MODE_SECRET } options, then chmodSync the file after writing completes.
steps: Read src/evolve/lifecycle/export.ts lines 1-30 — confirm DIR_MODE_SECRET and FILE_MODE_SECRET are not imported (neither from node:fs nor config/defaults.js)

Read src/evolve/lifecycle/export.ts lines 185-260 — confirm mkdirSync(parentDir, { recursive: true }) at ~line 238 has no mode option, and createWriteStream(bundlePath) at ~line 242 has no mode option
Add chmodSync to the existing node:fs import in export.ts
Add import { DIR_MODE_SECRET, FILE_MODE_SECRET } from ../../config/defaults.js to export.ts
Change mkdirSync(parentDir, { recursive: true }) to mkdirSync(parentDir, { recursive: true, mode: DIR_MODE_SECRET }) in export.ts
Add chmodSync(parentDir, DIR_MODE_SECRET) on the line immediately after mkdirSync in export.ts — fixes existing directories
Change createWriteStream(bundlePath) to createWriteStream(bundlePath, { mode: FILE_MODE_SECRET }) in export.ts
After the await pipeline(...) call completes (archive is fully written), add chmodSync(bundlePath, FILE_MODE_SECRET) to fix permissions on the archive file
Run the full test suite — confirm export/lifecycle tests pass with no regressions
acceptanceCriteria: The export bundle parent directory is created with mode 0700 — stat confirms no group/other read or execute bits
The export bundle archive (.tar.gz) is written with mode 0600 — stat confirms no group/other read bits
